conversations.summary: Customer Vivek requested a quotation for five 8-ton chillers, specifying that he wants the quotation sent via WhatsApp. The agent confirmed the suitable model as DC10000, priced at AED 107,500, with a delivery time of 2–3 working days from Dubai, subject to stock confirmation, and a 1-year warranty. Vivek repeatedly provided his contact details, and the agent is in the process of confirming the stock and sending the quotation on WhatsApp.

messages.content:
Dear Vivek,
Tel: 917977915393

Good day!

Thank you for your inquiry with Vitasales.
We’re pleased to offer our DC10000, suitable for your stated use case.

Product Offer

  • Model: DC10000
  • Special Offer Price (AED): 107500

Key Features

  • Tropicalized compressor for UAE climate
  • Durable build for continuous operation
  • Easy service access and low maintenance

Commercial Terms

  • Delivery: 2–3 working days ex-Dubai (subject to stock at confirmation)
  • Warranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
  • Validity: 7 days from the date of this quotation
  • Payment: 100% advance / COD (as agreed)
  • Price Note: Exclusive of VAT and installation, if applicable

Next Steps

We appreciate your consideration and look forward to your confirmation.

Best regards,

Vitasales
+91-8657051455 | vitasales@gmail.com
VITAFI
Centrum Wagle Estate
Tel: +91-8657051455 | Fax: +91-8657051455
Group: https://www.vitasales.com
Division: https://vitasales.com
(Download brochures: http://www.vitasales.com/downloads/)

messages.content: Hi Vivek, thanks for confirming — we have your requirement for 5 chillers of 8 Ton each. We will check whether these requested chillers are manufactured by us and share the quotation with you on WhatsApp shortly.

The suitable model identified is DC10000. Price is AED 107,500. Delivery is 2–3 working days ex-Dubai, subject to stock at confirmation, with 1 year warranty against manufacturing defects. Please confirm to proceed with the quotation and order details.
